mapper.sql: WHERE notice.NTC_STATUS_CD = 'NTCC0006' AND notice.NTC_USE_YN = 'Y' AND (notice.NTC_PSTG_BGNG_DT IS NULL OR notice.NTC_PSTG_BGNG_DT <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND (notice.NTC_PSTG_END_DT IS NULL OR notice.NTC_PSTG_END_DT >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NOTICE notice JOIN CMM_CODE type_code ON type_code.CMM_CD = notice.NTC_TYPE_CD AND type_code.CMM_USE_YN = 'Y' JOIN CMM_CODE type_group ON type_group.CMM_SN = type_code.CMM_PARENT_SN AND type_group.CMM_CD = 'NTCG01' AND type_group.CMM_USE_YN = 'Y'
AND notice.NTC_TYPE_CD = #{typeCode}
AND notice.NTC_TYPE_CD != 'NTCC0008'
AND (notice.NTC_TTL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR notice.NTC_CN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT notice.NTC_SN, notice.NTC_TYPE_CD, type_code.CMM_NM AS NTC_TYPE_NM, notice.NTC_TTL, notice.NTC_CN, notice.NTC_PSTG_BGNG_DT, notice.NTC_PSTG_END_DT, notice.NTC_PIN_YN, notice.NTC_VIEW_CNT, notice.NTC_REG_DT FROM NOTICE notice JOIN CMM_CODE type_code ON type_code.CMM_CD = notice.NTC_TYPE_CD AND type_code.CMM_USE_YN = 'Y' JOIN CMM_CODE type_group ON type_group.CMM_SN = type_code.CMM_PARENT_SN AND type_group.CMM_CD = 'NTCG01' AND type_group.CMM_USE_YN = 'Y'
AND notice.NTC_SN = #{noticeId} LIMIT 1
mapper.sql: FROM NOTICE notice JOIN CMM_CODE type_code ON type_code.CMM_CD = notice.NTC_TYPE_CD JOIN CMM_CODE type_group ON type_group.CMM_SN = type_code.CMM_PARENT_SN AND type_group.CMM_CD = 'NTCG01' JOIN CMM_CODE status_code ON status_code.CMM_CD = notice.NTC_STATUS_CD JOIN CMM_CODE status_group ON status_group.CMM_SN = status_code.CMM_PARENT_SN AND status_group.CMM_CD = 'NTCG02' JOIN USERS writer ON writer.USR_SN = notice.NTC_WRTR_USR_SN
mapper.select:
SELECT notice.NTC_SN, notice.NTC_WRTR_USR_SN, writer.USR_NM AS NTC_WRTR_NM, notice.NTC_TYPE_CD, type_code.CMM_NM AS NTC_TYPE_NM, notice.NTC_STATUS_CD, status_code.CMM_NM AS NTC_STATUS_NM, notice.NTC_TTL, notice.NTC_CN, notice.NTC_PSTG_BGNG_DT, notice.NTC_PSTG_END_DT, notice.NTC_PIN_YN, notice.NTC_VIEW_CNT, notice.NTC_USE_YN, notice.NTC_REG_DT, notice.NTC_UPDT_DT
ORDER BY notice.NTC_SN DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT notice.NTC_SN, notice.NTC_WRTR_USR_SN, writer.USR_NM AS NTC_WRTR_NM, notice.NTC_TYPE_CD, type_code.CMM_NM AS NTC_TYPE_NM, notice.NTC_STATUS_CD, status_code.CMM_NM AS NTC_STATUS_NM, notice.NTC_TTL, notice.NTC_CN, notice.NTC_PSTG_BGNG_DT, notice.NTC_PSTG_END_DT, notice.NTC_PIN_YN, notice.NTC_VIEW_CNT, notice.NTC_USE_YN, notice.NTC_REG_DT, notice.NTC_UPDT_DT
WHERE notice.NTC_SN = #{noticeId} AND notice.NTC_USE_YN = 'Y' LIMIT 1

SELECT notice.NTC_SN, notice.NTC_WRTR_USR_SN, writer.USR_NM AS NTC_WRTR_NM, notice.NTC_TYPE_CD, type_code.CMM_NM AS NTC_TYPE_NM, notice.NTC_STATUS_CD, status_code.CMM_NM AS NTC_STATUS_NM, notice.NTC_TTL, notice.NTC_CN, notice.NTC_PSTG_BGNG_DT, notice.NTC_PSTG_END_DT, notice.NTC_PIN_YN, notice.NTC_VIEW_CNT, notice.NTC_USE_YN, notice.NTC_REG_DT, notice.NTC_UPDT_DT
WHERE notice.NTC_SN = #{noticeId} LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTICE ( NTC_WRTR_USR_SN, NTC_TYPE_CD, NTC_STATUS_CD, NTC_TTL, NTC_CN, NTC_PSTG_BGNG_DT, NTC_PSTG_END_DT, NTC_PIN_YN, NTC_REG_ID, NTC_UPDT_ID ) VALUES ( #{writerUserSn}, #{typeCode}, #{statusCode}, #{title}, #{content}, #{postingStartAt}, #{postingEndAt}, #{pinnedYn}, #{actorId}, #{actorId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTICE SET NTC_TYPE_CD = #{typeCode}, NTC_STATUS_CD = #{statusCode}, NTC_TTL = #{title}, NTC_CN = #{content}, NTC_PSTG_BGNG_DT = #{postingStartAt}, NTC_PSTG_END_DT = #{postingEndAt}, NTC_PIN_YN = #{pinnedYn}, NTC_UPDT_ID = #{actorId} WHERE NTC_SN = #{noticeSn} AND NTC_USE_YN = 'Y' AND NTC_UPDT_DT = #{expectedUpdatedAt}
